purpose: Catch vague transition lines that replace an event sequence with blur, haze, or fog.
rejectIf: sentence describes literal image blur, smoke, fog, haze, or optical conditions
positiveExamples: The rest of the drill was a blur.
Everything after that was a haze.
negativeExamples: The blur in the photo came from a cracked lens.
The haze over the harbor came from smoke after the warehouse fire.
notes: This is a summary-fog transition, not a literal visual condition.
